---
title: "The Very Rev. Carey Brock"
---

## The Very Rev. Carey Brock

**Dates:** 1824-1892)

### Description

Dean of Guernsey, father of the Rev. [[person:201]Henry Brock], Vicar of Otterbourne

### Letters

- Letter from 7 June 1892
- Letter from March 17th 1888

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
